name: Construct: South Greenhouse 1
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Miner's Cameo from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 1.  Add two rooms to the south of the bunker entrance for eventual greenhouses.

effect.u_message:
There is a lot of space to the south of your bunker.  Perhaps you can build some greenhouses there?  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 1.  Add two rooms to the south of the bunker entrance for eventual greenhouses.
Construction complete.  There is a new set of rooms to the south, to be turned into greenhouses eventually.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: South Greenhouse 1

name: Construct: South Greenhouse 2
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Hollow Carver from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 2.  Add two more rooms to the south of the bunker entrance for eventual greenhouses.

effect.u_message:
There is more space next to the first two rooms you dug out to the south.  You can fit two more greenhouses there.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 2.  Add two more rooms to the south of the bunker entrance for eventual greenhouses.
Construction complete.  There is a two more rooms to the south, to be turned into greenhouses eventually.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: South Greenhouse 2

name: Construct: South Greenhouse 3
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Warped Reinforcement from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 3.  Upgrade the first set of dirt rooms into full greenhouses.

effect.u_message:
You can finally construct greenhouses now that you have climate control in the bunker.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 3.  Upgrade the first set of dirt rooms into full greenhouses.
Construction complete.  Two of the rooms to the south have been converted into greenhouses.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: South Greenhouse 3

name: Construct: South Greenhouse 4
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Cavernous Soul from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 4.  Upgrade the second set of dirt rooms into full greenhouses.

effect.u_message:
The first set of greenhouses was a success, now to build the last two.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: South Greenhouse 4.  Upgrade the second set of dirt rooms into full greenhouses.
Construction complete.  The last two rooms to the south have been converted into greenhouses.

name: Construct: South Greenhouse Skylight 1
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Glass Figurine from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: South Greenhouse Skylight 1.  Build a set of skylights for the first set of southern rooms.

effect.u_message:
You dug out two dirt rooms to plant in, now you need to let the sunlight in.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: South Greenhouse Skylight 1.  Build a set of skylights for the first set of southern rooms.
Construction complete.  The first set of southern rooms now have skylights.

description:

name: Construct: South Greenhouse Skylight 2
description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Crystalline Mirror from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: South Greenhouse Skylight 2.  Build a set of skylights for the second set of southern rooms.

effect.u_message:
The skylights in the first set of rooms work great, now you need to build the second set of sky lights.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Structure: South Greenhouse Skylight 2.  Build a set of skylights for the second set of southern rooms.
Construction complete.  The second set of southern rooms now have skylights.
